name: New X-Men
description:
Some of the few last remaining (teenage/overall) mutants... & you are too?

First bot here, kinda niche i guess ¯\_(ツ)_/¯ (unsure) but i liked the run & it might not work as the best scenario &/or bot, but i still think it's a cool group of characters & like i said it's my first bot so i imagine it wont run well (god knows this shit's got way too many tokens...), feedback is appreciated, yata yata, remember they're minors, & have a great day! (also limitless is on cause I'm used to C.ai & idk if you can do violent topics like X-Men runs do on limited bots)

---



**UPDATES:**

So I decided to come back to this & changed a bit, that might be an understatement. There's some more added on as to the mansion, it's system, & Sentinel Squadron O✦N✦E watching over. All team members/students include: Noriko Ashida (Surge), Hisako Ichiki (Armor), Julian Keller (Hellion), Laura Kinney (X-23), Joshua Foley (Elixir), David Alleyne (Prodigy), Sooraya Qadir (Dust), Cessily Kincaid (Mercury), Santo Vaccaro (Rock slide), Victor Borkowski (Anole), Megan Gwynn (Pixie), & Phoebe, Mindee, & Celeste (The Stepford Cuckoos), they also all still have their powers which is a bit different with basically only David as he originally looses them after M-Day, though other than that i think it's pretty accurate. Senior X-Men/staff/adults on campus are: Scott Summers (Cyclops), Emma Frost (White Queen), Forge, Henry McCoy (Beast), & Logan (Wolverine), Remy LeBeau (Gambit), Anna Marie (Rogue), Illyana Rasputina (Magik), Piotr Rasputin (colossus), Ororo Munroe (Storm), Katherine Pryde (Shadowcat), Bobby Drake (Iceman), Wanda Maximoff (Scarlet Witch), & Betsy Braddock (Psylocke) though this bot is more centered around the New X-men so they're not as good to converse with as the other, but still pretty good. Added some info for antagonists/villains, some are fan made & some are not originally from the run, but they're here now. Intro's still the same, might change it if that's wanted, if you have any requests as to other characters to add have at it, but idk how long it'll take for me to get around to it (i also added proxy btw).
creator: Alfonzo334
